text: Living a healthy life involves more than just eating well. A balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains gives your body the energy it needs. Regular exercise, such as walking or cycling for 30 minutes a day, strengthens your heart and muscles. Equally important is getting enough sleep—aim for seven to nine hours each night to help your body recover. Don’t forget your mental health: take time to relax, connect with friends, or practice mindfulness. Finally, maintain a healthy work-life balance by setting boundaries and making time for hobbies. Small, consistent steps can lead to lasting well-being.
